name: 血誓仪式
description: 对4格内一个目标施加「血誓诅咒」持续6回合：飞段受到的任何伤害（含自伤）同时作为真实伤害施加给目标
code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var target = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 4, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!target || target.needsTargetSelection) return target; var alreadyOathed = target.statusTags && target.statusTags.some(function(t) { return t.type === 'blood-oath'; }); if (alreadyOathed) return { success: false, message: target.name + '已处于血誓诅咒中' }; addStatusEffectById(target.instanceId, { id: 'blood-oath-' + target.instanceId, name: '血誓诅咒', type: 'blood-oath', currentDuration: 6, currentUses: -1, intensity: 1, stacks: 1 }); addRuleById(caster.instanceId, 'rule-hidan-blood-oath-reflect'); addRuleById(target.instanceId, 'rule-blood-oath-tick'); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '对' + target.name + '施加了血誓诅咒（持续6回合），飞段受到的所有伤害将同时施加给目标' }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '对4格内一个目标施加血誓诅咒（6回合），飞段受到的伤害同时作为真实伤害施加给目标', expectedValues: {} }; }
